name: Aunt Eda's Peanut Butter Candy
recipeInstructions:
1. Take one egg white (use one as it is easier to work with). Beat the egg white until stiff.
2. Gradually add sifted confectioner's sugar, forming a stiff dough. Use at least 1 whole box of sugar.
3. Roll out the mixture on a powdered sugar-dusted surface, shaping it into a circle.
4. Spread peanut butter along the edge.
5. Roll up the dough in a jelly-roll fashion and slice into 1/4-inch thick pieces.
6. Let sit for one hour before serving.
7. Store in the freezer for later use as a quick candy snack or for unexpected visitors.
